name: FORGE — 5-Email Nurture Sequence
description: Triggered when a lead downloads a lead magnet. Sends a 5-email sequence over 21 days.

setup.trigger: Webhook — fire when lead submits lead magnet form
setup.import_instructions: Import into n8n. Connect Resend credentials. Update email copy in each Send Email node.

sequence.subject: Your [Lead Magnet Name] is here
sequence.purpose: Deliver the promised content + set expectations
sequence.body_outline: Thank them. Deliver the asset. Tell them what's coming over the next 2 weeks (value, not pitch). One soft CTA: reply with their #1 challenge.

sequence.subject: The thing most founders get wrong about [topic]
sequence.purpose: Pure value, no pitch. Build trust.
sequence.body_outline: Share a counterintuitive insight related to their problem. No mention of your services. CTA: link to your best content piece.

sequence.subject: How [Client Name] went from [problem] to [result]
sequence.body_outline: Short case study (3 paragraphs): situation → what changed → result. CTA: 'We did this in 90 days. Curious if it'd work for you?'

sequence.subject: A system for [specific outcome they care about]
sequence.purpose: Introduce your framework. Position as the solution.
sequence.body_outline: Introduce the FORGE system at a high level. Explain the 6 pillars briefly. Show how they connect to the reader's goal. CTA: 'I mapped out what this would look like for you — want to see it?'

sequence.subject: Last thing (then I'll leave you alone)
sequence.purpose: Direct close. Create urgency without being pushy.
sequence.body_outline: Acknowledge you've sent a few emails. Be honest: 'I only work with X founders per month. If now isn't the right time, no hard feelings — I'll keep sharing useful stuff.' CTA: Book a free 30-min Authority Audit call.

body.subject: The thing most founders get wrong about content

note: Full 5-email sequence continues with additional wait + send nodes. See docs/getting-started.md for complete setup.
